info.name: Retrieve a list of service points

params.name: country_code
params.description: Country to retrieve service points for, as an ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code.

params.name: carrier_code
params.description: Carrier codes to filter results by.

params.name: use_integration_carriers
params.description: Filters service points to carriers enabled in the authenticated integration's settings.

params.name: address
params.description: Free-text address used as the reference point for the search.

params.name: address_street
params.description: Street of the reference address.

params.name: address_house_number
params.description: House number of the reference address.

params.name: address_postal_code
params.description: Postal code of the reference address.

params.name: address_city
params.description: City of the reference address.

params.name: latitude
params.description: Latitude of the reference point.

params.name: longitude
params.description: Longitude of the reference point.

params.name: ne_latitude
params.description: Latitude of the north-east corner of the bounding box.

params.name: ne_longitude
params.description: Longitude of the north-east corner of the bounding box.

params.name: sw_latitude
params.description: Latitude of the south-west corner of the bounding box.

params.name: sw_longitude
params.description: Longitude of the south-west corner of the bounding box.

params.name: radius
params.description: Search radius in meters from the reference point.

params.name: carrier_service_point_id
params.description: Carrier-specific identifiers of the service points to return.

params.name: carrier_shop_type
params.description: Filters results by carrier-specific shop type.

params.name: general_shop_type
params.description: Filters results by general shop type. Use this to narrow results without having to handle each carrier's specific shop types separately.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of service points to return.

items.docs: Find service points for selected carriers in a given area.

params.name: service_point_id
params.description: Unique Sendcloud identifier of the service point.

info.name: Check availability of a service point

params.name: service_point_id
params.description: Unique Sendcloud identifier of the service point.

items.docs: Check whether a service point is currently available.
